title: Crab and Orzo Salad
ingredients: 3tbsp and 1tsp of freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions:
Bring a large saucepan of lightly salted water to a boil, and cook the orzo according to the package directions for al dente. Drain and refrigerate for 1 hour.
In a large bowl toss the chilled orzo, crabmeat, tomatoes, carrots, peppers and the green onions.
In a small bowl, mix the mayonnaise, chili sauce, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and the pepper sauce. Add to the orzo/crabmeat mixture and toss.
